label: HDR cinematic post chain — hsv_mute + level_post + bloom_post (lifted from iris_2 final params)
context: Replaces attractor_chamber's grain-add atmospheric with the proven HDR cinematic eye chain from iris_2. Crushed blacks → S-curve gamma → bloom 'inputplusbloom' = signature 'burning embers' luminous look. Pulls the cloud into the cusp 4→5 'heavy and beautiful' register: heavy via crushed darks, beautiful via bloom halo on cycling-color particles.

operations.notes: WOBAR muted register — 0.78 from iris_2 final tuning. Brings cycling-light colors down from saturated to dusty-30%-from-neon range.
Crushed blacks (inlow=0.06 — anything below pure black), rolled highlights (inhigh=0.95 — compresses brightest), more contrast, S-curve gamma (0.92 cinematic). Lifted from iris_2.
HDR signature. inputplusbloom = original + bloom result. Lifted from iris_2 final params. Particles glow with halos in the dusty WOBAR palette — luminous-iris-in-black-void register.
null_mirror_out now reads from end of HDR post chain instead of comp_mirror directly.
Without opaque-black bg, areas outside the source render area show as transparent. Setting bgcolora=1 makes the letterbox top/bottom bars solid black instead of TD-checkerboard transparent.

verified: Render output reads as cinematic — solid black bg, dusty-mauve cloud, bloom halo on particles
Crushed blacks lock the eye reading (no faded grays in the dark)
At Energy=0.85 the Aizawa torus is sculpting; bilateral mirror creates butterfly/two-halves-of-iris reading
next_move: move_005 — record_out moviefileoutTOP (h264 yuv420 mp4, audio_master/audio_in @ 44100Hz). Drop in base_audio_v001.tox, bind ctrl_master.par.Energy.expr to audio_master/smooth_out['energy']. Final ctrl_master polish.
